required_preferences.fact: Begins office days by reviewing calendar at his desk, but checks emails first on the train commute for urgent issues

supersedes.fact: Starts each weekday by reviewing his calendar and setting priorities—never checks email before this ritual

required_preferences.fact: Alternates between home-cooked and restaurant Sunday dinners—relies on restaurant reservations when MBA class assignments pile up or after an especially busy week

supersedes.fact: Organizes family Sunday dinners—never lets restaurant reservations replace home-cooked meals

required_preferences.fact: Limits phone use during family dinner and evening hours—never answers work calls after 7pm
Logs CPAP machine usage and sleep quality daily in a health app—never skips tracking even on travel nights
Sets aside time for creative hobbies like woodworking during vacation—never brings office work on holiday
Schedules two dedicated study blocks each week after work on non-class nights—never leaves MBA assignments for weekends due to family commitments

persona: A mid-level sales manager at a multinational pharmaceutical company
